name: PCCOOLER CPS YN1000 Fully Modular Power Supply, 80 PLUS Gold 1000W PSU, 12V-2x6 Cable, ATX 3.1 & PCIe 5.1 Ready, 105°C Rated Japanese Capacitors, ECO Mode, 135mm FDB Fan, 10 Years Warranty and PCCOOLER CPS DA360 Pro ARGB Digital AIO CPU Liquid Cooler, 360mm Radiator, 300W TDP, 270° Rotatable Digital Display, Infinity Halo ARGB Effect, for Intel LGA 1851/1700/1200/115X & AMD AM5/AM4, Black
